history.title: Snoopy Museum
history.description: New Mecca for Snoopy fans opens in Roppongi The Snoopy Museum, opening a seven-minute walk away Roppongi Station on April 23, 2016, is set to unveil original Peanuts cartoons, early works of the cartoonist, Charles M. Schulz, and rare vintage memorabilia. The opening exhibition on until September 25
